forms.formTitle: EPIC FHIR Patient Consent Form v3
forms.taskVariable: [{"key": "applicationId", "label": "Submission Id", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "applicationStatus", "label": "Submission Status", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "submitterLastName", "label": "Submitter Last Name", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "submitterFirstName", "label": "Submitter First Name", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "submitterEmail", "label": "Submitter Email", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "currentUser", "label": "Current User", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "currentUserRoles", "label": "Current User Roles", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "medicalRecordNumber", "label": "Medical Record Number", "type": "textfield"}, {"key": "firstName", "label": "First Name", "type": "textfield"}, {"key": "patientId", "label": "Patient ID", "type": "textfield"}, {"key": "surrogateKey", "label": "surrogateKey", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "eMailAddress", "label": "E-mail Address", "type": "email"}]

content.title: EPIC FHIR Patient Consent Form v3
content.name: epic-fhir-patient-consent-form-v3

components.label: Street, Apartment No., P.O. Box, R.R. NO.
buttons

components.title: Review
components.label: Review
Submit Action
Current User Roles
components.calculateValue: const localdata = localStorage.getItem('UserDetails') && (JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('UserDetails'))) || []; value = localdata?.groups?.map(group => group.replace(new RegExp('^/+|/+$', 'g'), '')) || [];

components.label: surrogateKey
components.calculateValue: value || (function() {  var s = [];  var hex = '0123456789abcdef';  for (var i = 0; i < 36; i++) { s[i] = hex[Math.floor(Math.random() * 16)]; }  s[14] = '4';  s[19] = hex[(s[19] & 0x3) | 0x8];  s[8] = s[13] = s[18] = s[23] = '-';  return s.join('');})()

workflows.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:camunda="http://camunda.org/schema/1.0/bpmn" xmlns:ns3="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI" xmlns:ns4="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC" xmlns:ns5="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" id="Definitions_0993co4" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn" exporter="Camunda Modeler" exporterVersion="4.8.1">
  <bpmn:process id="epic-fhir-patient-consent-form-v3" name="epic-fhir-patient-consent-form-v3" isExecutable="true" camunda:versionTag="1">
    <bpmn:startEvent id="StartEvent_1" name="Start Request">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener event="start">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
// surrogateKey arrives from form submission as a process variable.
// Fallback: generate server-side if for any reason it is empty.
var existing = execution.getVariable('surrogateKey');
if (!existing || existing === '') {
  var uuid = java.util.UUID.randomUUID().toString();
  execution.setVariable('surrogateKey', uuid);
}
          </camunda:script>
        </camunda:executionListener>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Start_To_GetToken</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:startEvent>
    <bpmn:userTask id="reviewer" name="Review Submission" camunda:assignee="" camunda:candidateGroups="formsflow/formsflow-reviewer">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:formData>
          <camunda:formField id="action" label="Action" type="string"/>
          <camunda:formField id="surrogateKey" label="Surrogate Key" type="string"/>
        </camunda:formData>
        <camunda:taskListener event="create" id="">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
task.setVariable('surrogateKey', task.getVariable('surrogateKey'));
          </camunda:script>
        </camunda:taskListener>
        <camunda:taskListener event="complete">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
task.setVariable('applicationStatus', task.getVariable('action'));
task.setVariable('deleteReason', "completed");
task.setVariable('surrogateKey', task.getVariable('surrogateKey'));
          </camunda:script>
        </camunda:taskListener>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_SendEmail_To_Reviewer</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>SequenceFlow_0jg4sg3</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:userTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="SequenceFlow_0jg4sg3" sourceRef="reviewer" targetRef="ExclusiveGateway_0l1c65j"/>
    <bpmn:exclusiveGateway id="ExclusiveGateway_0l1c65j" name="Action Taken?">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener event="start">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
execution.setVariable('surrogateKey', execution.getVariable('surrogateKey'));
          </camunda:script>
        </camunda:executionListener>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>SequenceFlow_0jg4sg3</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>SequenceFlow_1x38yu4</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:outgoing>SequenceFlow_0pc6hcp</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:exclusiveGateway>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="SequenceFlow_1x38yu4" name="approve" sourceRef="ExclusiveGateway_0l1c65j" targetRef="Task_1hko8r7">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">${action == 'Approved'}</bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="SequenceFlow_0pc6hcp" name="reject" sourceRef="ExclusiveGateway_0l1c65j" targetRef="Activity_0obho59">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">${action == 'Rejected'}</bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:task id="Task_1hko8r7" name="Update Application Status 1">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener event="start">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">execution.setVariable('surrogateKey', execution.getVariable('surrogateKey'));</camunda:script>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.BPMFormDataPipelineListener" event="start">
          <camunda:field name="fields">
            <camunda:expression>["applicationId","applicationStatus","surrogateKey"]</camunda:expression>
          </camunda:field>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.FormSubmissionListener" event="start"/>
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.ApplicationStateListener" event="end"/>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>SequenceFlow_1x38yu4</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>SequenceFlow_00bn1p7</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:task>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="SequenceFlow_00bn1p7" sourceRef="Task_1hko8r7" targetRef="Activity_1gtnbpo"/>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Activity_1gtnbpo" name="SendBackApproval">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:connector>
          <camunda:inputOutput>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="url">http://192.168.29.128:8002/epic/approve</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="method">POST</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="headers">
              <camunda:map>
                <camunda:entry key="Content-Type">application/json</camunda:entry>
              </camunda:map>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="payload">
              <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
var patientId     = execution.getVariable("patientId");
var surrogateKey  = execution.getVariable("surrogateKey");
var applicationId = execution.getVariable("applicationId");
var approvedAt    = new Date().toISOString();

JSON.stringify({
  "patientId":     patientId,
  "applicationId": applicationId,
  "surrogateKey":  surrogateKey,
  "consentText":   "Patient has approved the consent form.",
  "approvedAt":    approvedAt
});
              </camunda:script>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:outputParameter name="epicResponse">
              <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">var responseBody = connector.getVariable("response");
responseBody;</camunda:script>
            </camunda:outputParameter>
          </camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:connectorId>http-connector</camunda:connectorId>
        </camunda:connector>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>SequenceFlow_00bn1p7</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_1cbkpva</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_03cla68">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_1cbkpva</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_0nqmlza</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_1cbkpva" sourceRef="Activity_1gtnbpo" targetRef="EndEvent_03cla68"/>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Start_To_GetToken" sourceRef="StartEvent_1" targetRef="Activity_GetKeycloakToken"/>
    <bpmn:scriptTask id="Activity_GetKeycloakToken" name="Get Keycloak Token" scriptFormat="javascript">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_Start_To_GetToken</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_GetToken_To_MagicLink</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:script>
        var system = java.lang.System;
        var url = system.getenv("KEYCLOAK_URL") + "/auth/realms/forms-flow-ai/protocol/openid-connect/token";
        var clientId = system.getenv("KEYCLOAK_CLIENTID") || "forms-flow-bpm";
        var clientSecret = system.getenv("KEYCLOAK_CLIENTSECRET");
        
        system.out.println(">>> [BPMN GetToken] Starting token request. URL: " + url + " | ClientID: " + clientId + " | Secret: " + clientSecret);
        
        try {
            var payload = "grant_type=client_credentials" + String.fromCharCode(38) + "client_id=" + clientId + String.fromCharCode(38) + "client_secret=" + clientSecret;
            
            var client = java.net.http.HttpClient.newHttpClient();
            var request = java.net.http.HttpRequest.newBuilder()
                .uri(java.net.URI.create(url))
                .header("Content-Type", "application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
                .POST(java.net.http.HttpRequest.BodyPublishers.ofString(payload))
                .build();
            
            var response = client.send(request, java.net.http.HttpResponse.BodyHandlers.ofString());
            system.out.println(">>> [BPMN GetToken] Response Status: " + response.statusCode());
            
            var body = response.body();
            if (response.statusCode() != 200) {
                system.out.println(">>> [BPMN GetToken] Response Error Body: " + body);
            }
            
            var json = JSON.parse(body);
            system.out.println(">>> [BPMN GetToken] Token key present in JSON: " + (json.access_token ? "YES" : "NO"));
            execution.setVariable("kcAccessToken", json.access_token);
        } catch (err) {
            system.out.println(">>> [BPMN GetToken] Error occurred: " + err.toString());
        }
      </bpmn:script>
    </bpmn:scriptTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_GetToken_To_MagicLink" sourceRef="Activity_GetKeycloakToken" targetRef="Activity_RequestMagicLink"/>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Activity_RequestMagicLink" name="Generate Magic Link">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:connector>
          <camunda:inputOutput>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="url">http://forms-flow-custom-services:5005/custom-services-api/v1/magic-links/request</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="method">POST</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="headers">
              <camunda:map>
                <camunda:entry key="Content-Type">application/json</camunda:entry>
                <camunda:entry key="Authorization">Bearer ${kcAccessToken}</camunda:entry>
              </camunda:map>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="payload">
              <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
                var email = execution.getVariable('eMailAddress') || execution.getVariable('submitterEmail') || execution.getVariable('email') || 'patient@example.com';
                var pid = execution.getProcessInstanceId();
                var system = java.lang.System;
                system.out.println(">>> [BPMN MagicLink] Generating payload for email: " + email + " | pid: " + pid);
                JSON.stringify({
                  "email": email,
                  "processInstanceId": pid,
                  "iss": "epic-fhir-portal",
                  "aud": "patient-consent",
                  "token_expiry": 2880
                });
              </camunda:script>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:outputParameter name="patientMagicLink">
              <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
                var response = connector.getVariable("response");
                var system = java.lang.System;
                system.out.println(">>> [BPMN MagicLink] Response from Custom Services: " + response);
                var json = JSON.parse(response);
                system.out.println(">>> [BPMN MagicLink] Extracted Link: " + json.magic_link);
                json.magic_link;
              </camunda:script>
            </camunda:outputParameter>
          </camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:connectorId>http-connector</camunda:connectorId>
        </camunda:connector>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_GetToken_To_MagicLink</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_MagicLink_To_SendEmail</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_MagicLink_To_SendEmail" sourceRef="Activity_RequestMagicLink" targetRef="Activity_SendEmail"/>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Activity_SendEmail" name="Send Email to Patient">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:connector>
          <camunda:inputOutput>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="to">
              <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
                execution.getVariable('eMailAddress') || execution.getVariable('submitterEmail') || execution.getVariable('email') || 'patient@example.com';
              </camunda:script>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="subject">EPIC FHIR Patient Consent Signature Required</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="text">
              <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
                var link = execution.getVariable('patientMagicLink');
                var msg = "Dear Patient,\n\n";
                msg += "Please click the following link to review and sign your EPIC FHIR Patient Consent Form:\n";
                msg += link + "\n\n";
                msg += "This link is valid for 48 hours.\n\n";
                msg += "Thank you,\nEPIC FHIR Patient Portal";
                msg;
              </camunda:script>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
          </camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:connectorId>mail-send</camunda:connectorId>
        </camunda:connector>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_MagicLink_To_SendEmail</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_SendEmail_To_Reviewer</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_SendEmail_To_Reviewer" sourceRef="Activity_SendEmail" targetRef="reviewer">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener event="take">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
            execution.setVariable('applicationStatus', 'New');
            execution.setVariable("surrogateKey", execution.getVariable("surrogateKey"));
          </camunda:script>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.BPMFormDataPipelineListener" event="take">
          <camunda:field name="fields">
            <camunda:expression>["applicationId","applicationStatus","medicalRecordNumber","surrogateKey"]</camunda:expression>
          </camunda:field>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.ApplicationStateListener" event="take"/>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:task id="Activity_0obho59" name="Update Application Status 2">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener event="start">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">execution.setVariable('surrogateKey', execution.getVariable('surrogateKey'));</camunda:script>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.BPMFormDataPipelineListener" event="start">
          <camunda:field name="fields">
            <camunda:expression>["applicationId","applicationStatus","surrogateKey"]</camunda:expression>
          </camunda:field>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.FormSubmissionListener" event="start"/>
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.ApplicationStateListener" event="end"/>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>SequenceFlow_0pc6hcp</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_0nqmlza</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:task>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_0nqmlza" sourceRef="Activity_0obho59" targetRef="EndEvent_03cla68"/>
  </bpmn:process>
  <bpmn:message id="Message_1ihrno3" name="Message_Email"/>
